Name: EASTMAN 13mm Brushless Impact Drill Torque 800W Power Driver 80Nm 26250 BPM Variable Speed Kit Fast Charger BMC Carry Case
Description: Introducing Eastman Brushless Drill Machine, featuring a 13mm chuck and delivered in a BMC box for convenience. Powered by an 800W motor, it offers versatile performance with speeds up to 1750 RPM and 26250 BPM impact energy. With a torque of 80Nm, it's ideal for a wide range of drilling and fastening applications, combining power and precision in one compact tool.
